title: Security Advisory for Java artifacts hosted at the Maven central repository
description: Security Advisory for Java artifacts hosted at the Maven central repository on GitHub

items.content_html:
Stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Liferay Portal 7.4.0 through 7.4.3.128, and Liferay DXP 2024.Q3.0 through 2024.Q3.5, 2024.Q2.0 through 2024.Q2.12, 2024.Q1.1 through 2024.Q1.12, and 7.4 GA through update 92 allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via remote app title field.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-43775
  • https://liferay.dev/portal/security/known-vulnerabilities/-/asset_publisher/jekt/content/CVE-2025-43775
  • https://github.com/liferay/liferay-portal/commit/e54b2b41564df4f11cfa77b3e6c4353cf0a3b16d
  • https://liferay.atlassian.net/browse/LPE-18123
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-88g3-pv3w-5wmr
items.title: [com.liferay:com.liferay.client.extension.web] Liferay Portal is vulnerable to XSS attacks via its remote app title field

items.content_html:
Reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Liferay Portal 7.4.3.110 through 7.4.3.128, and Liferay DXP 2024.Q3.1 through 2024.Q3.8, 2024.Q2.0 through 2024.Q2.13 and 2024.Q1.1 through 2024.Q1.12 allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the URL in search bar portlet

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-43781
  • https://liferay.dev/portal/security/known-vulnerabilities/-/asset_publisher/jekt/content/CVE-2025-43781
  • https://github.com/liferay/liferay-portal/commit/f6483b5cff5c07b562c52f9eec336b2ebc9eeacd
  • https://liferay.atlassian.net/browse/LPE-18124
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x5fw-8xgx-q6c9
items.title: [com.liferay:com.liferay.portal.search.web] Liferay Portal is vulnerable to XSS attack through its search bar portlet

items.content_html:
Enumeration of ERC from object entry in Liferay Portal 7.4.0 through 7.4.3.128, and Liferay DXP 2024.Q3.0 through 2024.Q3.1, 2024.Q2.0 through 2024.Q2.13, 2024.Q1.1 through 2024.Q1.12, 2023.Q4.0 and 7.4 GA through update 92 allow attackers to determine existent ERC in the application by exploit the time response.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-43786

items.content_html:
Stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Liferay Portal 7.4.3.45 through 7.4.3.128, and Liferay DXP 2024 Q2.0 through 2024.Q2.9, 2024.Q1.1 through 2024.Q1.12, and 7.4 update 45 through update 92 allows remote attackers to execute an arbitrary web script or HTML in the My Workflow Tasks page.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-43785
  • https://liferay.dev/portal/security/known-vulnerabilities/-/asset_publisher/jekt/content/CVE-2025-43785
  • https://github.com/liferay/liferay-portal/commit/5f1a7c347c81f05848f032a9e25cbc9abaab05ff
  • https://liferay.atlassian.net/browse/LPE-18074
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-66x6-8jgv-qpfh

items.content_html:
Improper Input Validation vulnerability in Apache DolphinScheduler. An authenticated user can execute any shell script server by alert script.

This issue affects Apache DolphinScheduler: before 3.2.2.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 3.3.1, which fixes the issue.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-43115
  • https://lists.apache.org/thread/qm36nrsv1vrr2j4o5q2wo75h3686hrnj
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3vcp-r62v-xpvg
items.title: [org.apache.dolphinscheduler:dolphinscheduler] Apache DolphinScheduler vulnerable to Alert Script Attack

items.content_html:
A stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Liferay Portal 7.4.0 through 7.4.3.132, and Liferay DXP 2025.Q2.0 through 2025.Q2.9, 2025.Q1.0 through 2025.Q1.16, 2024.Q4.0 through 2024.Q4.7, 2024.Q3.0 through 2024.Q3.13, 2024.Q2.0 through 2024.Q2.13, 2024.Q1.1 through 2024.Q1.19 and 7.4 GA through update 92 allows an remote authenticated attacker to inject JavaScript through Custom Object field label. The malicious payload is stored and executed through Process Builder's Configuration tab without proper escaping.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-43776
  • https://liferay.dev/portal/security/known-vulnerabilities/-/asset_publisher/jekt/content/CVE-2025-43776
  • https://liferay.atlassian.net/browse/LPE-18277
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rcc7-jx7p-hrv4
